the housekeeping manager oversees 100 rooms in a hotel and collaborates with the concierge to address guest concerns each day a certain percentage of rooms require attention due to various issues such as cleaning maintenance or guest requests on average 20% of rooms need attention the concierge assists in addressing 40% of these concerns by coordinating with other departments  
the number of rooms requiring attention on a given day follows a Poisson distribution with a mean of 20 what is the probability that exactly 15 rooms need attention on that day  
the effectiveness of the concierge's assistance can be modeled by a success rate of solving 90% of the concerns they address if the concierge assists with 8 concerns on a particular day what is the probability that at least 7 of these concerns are resolved successfully  
the probability that exactly 15 rooms need attention on that day is 0.000171  
the probability that at least 7 of these concerns are resolved successfully is 0.999999
